title: Timeline or Date Filter Value of "Last Workday"
excerpt:
My daily check-in dashboard has a view of work completed yesterday. 
Ideally, it would be work completed in the last workday. 
This would allow for a standup view that is more valuable at the start of the week.

posts.author: Parke (Parke Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
My daily check-in dashboard has a view of work completed yesterday.

Ideally, it would be work completed in the last workday.

This would allow for a standup view that is more valuable at the start of the week.
